title: Tweakified Gear
description: Yet another pack that tweaks tools and weapons. Copper tools change based on durability.
body:
This pack is intended to be more vanilla than my other--though similar--resource pack, [Nullified Gear](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nullified-gear). I will update Nullified Gear with the changes that I do to this, but this will be my priority of the two.

Tweakified Gear tweaks all the tools. I found it odd that spears have a thing in the center of them (or on the end of them in the inventory opposite the head) that no other item had. So, I tweaked all the spears so that leathery bit (I assume it is supposed to be a leather grip) is the material it is made of. Looking at Netherite closely as well, they often have 3 pixels on the handle that I imagine are material grips, so I tweaked the rest of the tools and weapons to match.

Future stuff and things:
- Configurable textures with Respackopts mod
  - Material Grips on swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes.
  - Copper tool/weapon oxidization
- Other tools change due to durability. (configurable)
- Mace changes model due to unique Enchantment(s) (configurable)
